name: Steven
notes: Adult BMI is about 25.8. Goal set toward high protein and slight calorie surplus for muscle gain.

name: Carlotta
notes: Adult BMI is about 27.4. Calorie goal set for maintenance range; carbs should be distributed consistently and coordinated with her clinician's diabetes plan.

name: Greyson
notes: BMI is about 17.7, but child assessment should use CDC BMI-for-age percentile. Recommendation focuses on steady growth, protein at meals, calcium/vitamin D, and regular meals/snacks.

name: Elleanor
notes: BMI is about 21.7, but child assessment should use CDC BMI-for-age percentile. Recommendation emphasizes growth-supportive meals, limiting excess sugary drinks, and prioritizing fiber, calcium, and protein.

name: Euan
notes: BMI is about 14.3, but child assessment should use CDC BMI-for-age percentile. Recommendation is a balanced age-appropriate intake with protein, dairy or equivalent, fruit, vegetables, and whole grains.

name: Penelope
notes: BMI is about 17.7, but child assessment should use CDC BMI-for-age percentile. Recommendation emphasizes balanced meals, calcium/vitamin D, and regular protein intake.

name: Garrett
notes: BMI is about 19.5, but child assessment should use CDC BMI-for-age percentile. Recommendation focuses on structured meals, fruits/vegetables, protein at meals, and minimizing sugar-heavy snacks.
